title: Ethisphere Names Johnson Controls as One of the World's Most Ethical Companies for the 16th Year
text: CORK, Ireland , March 15, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Johnson Controls (NYSE: JCI), the global leader for smart, healthy, and sustainable buildings, has been recognized by Ethisphere as one of the World's Most Ethical Companies in 2023, marking the 16th time Johnson Controls has been named to this list. The 2023 list recognized 135 honorees spanning 19 countries and 48 industries.

title: How Meraki Co-Founders Hit The Jackpot Again With Samsara
text: After hitting it big with Meraki, Sanjit Bitwas and John Bicket cofounded Samsara, which now has a market valuation over $10 billion. The post How Meraki Co-Founders Hit The Jackpot Again With Samsara appeared first on Investor's Business Daily.

title: Building managers can digitally assess carbon footprints, set emissions targets, manage emissions, and track progress for reporting
text: As national leaders seek proof of progress towards net zero goals, they are calling on building owners to set goals, track progress, and report transparently against targets. Accurate carbon footprint assessment, target-setting, reduction management, and tracking are paramount, as climate disclosures become mandatory not only for building certification and environmental reporting, but also for financial regulation.

title: Johnson Controls Announces Increased Quarterly Dividend
text: CORK, Ireland , March 8, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The board of directors of Johnson Controls International plc (NYSE: JCI), the global leader in smart, healthy and sustainable buildings, has approved a regular quarterly dividend of $.36 per share of common stock, payable on April 14, 2023, to shareholders of record at the close of business on March 20, 2023. This represents a $0.01 cent increase over the previous quarterly dividend.

title: Sensormatic Solutions by Johnson Controls next-generation, multi-sensor, AI-based technology and analytics suite redefines storefront visibility
text: NEUHAUSEN, Switzerland--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Sensormatic Solutions, the leading global retail solutions portfolio of Johnson Controls, is empowering retailers with an improved and integrated storefront visibility solution.

title: Sensormatic Solutions by Johnson Controls celebrates momentum in sustainable hard tag recirculation program ahead of EuroShop 2023
text: NEUHAUSEN, Switzerland--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Sensormatic Solutions, the leading global retail solutions portfolio of Johnson Controls, is continuing its commitment to supporting a more responsible retail industry through its award-winning hard tag recirculation program. Since its inception in 2010, Sensormatic Solutions has shipped 16.5 billion hard tags, 13.7 billion of which have been recirculated.
